options.text: I was just lucky to have a great team.
Getting everyone on the same page was tough, but I set weekly check-ins and it really helped.
The project was easy because we had a lot of time.
I didn't have any challenges—it all went smoothly.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用STAR原则，明确挑战并说明解决方案，符合面试回答规范。其他选项要么回避问题（opt_1, opt_4），要么否认挑战的存在（opt_3），不符合面试官期望的反思与成长型回答。
content.speakerText: You mentioned you led a team project—what was your biggest challenge?
content.speakerTextCn: 你提到带过团队项目，最大的挑战是什么？

options.text: I got promoted after that project.
I became way more organized—I now plan everything two weeks ahead.
It was just part of my job description.

content.explanation: 正确答案强调行为改变（更有序地规划），符合‘成长与行为改变’的评分标准。其他选项聚焦结果（晋升、老板喜欢）或被动态度，未能体现个人能力提升，不符合面试官考察重点。
content.speakerText: How did that experience make you better at your job?
content.speakerTextCn: 这段经历让你在工作中变得更好了吗？
